creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
I am trying to cleanup the PR for p5-Mail-SpamAssassin;

Can you tell me why you need libspamc?  what is it for? why you need it 
with SpamAssassin, what it enhances?

Is it just a programming interface to spamd? spamc?
